pi_items.source: Cross-referenced with task.json description which explicitly requests creation of these three views.
Cross-referenced with task.json description which explicitly requests exporting results to these three files.
Confirmed by task description and matched against the local hr_schema.sql data which confirms these job IDs actually exist in the JOBS and EMPLOYEES tables.
Confirmed by task description and setup_task.sh script which systematically creates these exact categories in QUARTERLY_COSTS and uses them as columns in ANNUAL_SUMMARY_WIDE.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating three Oracle DB views (DEPT_JOB_SALARY_PIVOT, QUARTERLY_SPENDING_PIVOT, ANNUAL_COSTS_NORMALIZED) and exporting them to CSV files on the Desktop (dept_job_salary_pivot.csv, quarterly_spending_report.csv, annual_costs_normalized.csv). The underlying data includes standard Oracle HR job roles such as IT_PROG, SA_REP, FI_ACCOUNT, ST_CLERK, SH_CLERK, and SA_MAN. The cost categories targeted for unpivoting (SALARY, BENEFITS, EQUIPMENT, TRAINING) exist in the dynamically created synthetic tables QUARTERLY_COSTS and ANNUAL_SUMMARY_WIDE.
